mapper.select: SELECT symbol AS `key` ,name AS `value` FROM fx_symbol WHERE deleted = 0 AND symbol_type = #{symbolType} ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT COUNT(symbol) FROM fx_symbol WHERE deleted = 0
AND symbol_type = #{symbolType}

SELECT symbol AS symbol ,symbol_type AS symbolType ,name AS name ,valid_scale AS validScale ,FORMAT(target_volatility, valid_scale) AS targetVolatility ,sort_order AS sortOrder ,deleted AS deleted ,created_at AS createdAt ,created_by AS createdBy ,updated_at AS updatedAt ,updated_by AS updatedBy FROM fx_symbol WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
